title: Linux Platform Services: File Pickers, Notifications, and Native Integration
subtitle: Master the 20+ platform services that bridge your MAUI app with Linux desktop environments, from xdg-desktop-portal to D-Bus notifications and encrypted secure storage.
pullQuotes: The key to robust Linux integration is embracing the freedesktop.org standards while maintaining intelligent fallbacks for the diverse ecosystem of desktop environments.
With xdg-desktop-portal, zenity, and kdialog as your three-tier fallback strategy, your file picker will work seamlessly whether users are running GNOME, KDE, or a minimal window manager.
Platform services aren't just about feature parity—they're about respecting the user's desktop environment choices and degrading gracefully when services are unavailable.
